accessibility-pattern-library.name: Accessibility Pattern Library
accessibility-pattern-library.description: A comprehensive library of accessible UI patterns with ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support. Provides ready-to-use, tested patterns that meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
accessibility-pattern-library.author: workspace

api-integration-layer.name: API Integration Layer
api-integration-layer.description: A layered API integration system with request/response transformation, retry logic, and caching. Provides a clean abstraction over REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket APIs.
api-integration-layer.author: workspace

authentication-flow-designer.name: Authentication Flow Designer
authentication-flow-designer.description: Designs and implements secure authentication flows including OAuth2, OIDC, SAML, and MFA patterns. Provides battle-tested templates for login, registration, password reset, and session management.
authentication-flow-designer.author: workspace

component-lifecycle-manager.name: Component Lifecycle Manager
component-lifecycle-manager.description: Manages component lifecycle from creation to destruction. Handles initialization, mounting, updating, and cleanup patterns across React, Vue, and vanilla JS.
component-lifecycle-manager.author: workspace

contextual-ambiguity-detector.name: Contextual Ambiguity Detector
contextual-ambiguity-detector.description: Scans codebases for hardcoded assumptions about user behavior, tech stack, UI patterns, or edge cases. Flags where the code chose one solution without documenting why alternatives were rejected.
contextual-ambiguity-detector.author: workspace

cursor-position-tracker.name: Cursor Position Tracker
cursor-position-tracker.description: Tracks and manages cursor position across text inputs, rich text editors, and custom selection interfaces. Handles IME composition, RTL text, and multi-cursor scenarios.
cursor-position-tracker.author: workspace

dashboard-composition-engine.name: Dashboard Composition Engine
dashboard-composition-engine.description: Composes data-rich dashboards from modular widget systems. Handles layout grids, data fetching strategies, real-time updates, and responsive widget reflow.
dashboard-composition-engine.author: workspace

database-schema-designer.name: Database Schema Designer
database-schema-designer.description: Designs normalized, performant database schemas with proper indexing, constraints, and migration strategies. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite with relationship optimization.
database-schema-designer.author: workspace

data-migration-orchestrator.name: Data Migration Orchestrator
data-migration-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates complex data migrations between systems with validation, rollback, and progress tracking. Handles schema mapping, data transformation, and integrity verification.
data-migration-orchestrator.author: workspace

data-visualization-engine.name: Data Visualization Engine
data-visualization-engine.description: Creates interactive charts, graphs, and visual data representations. Supports D3, Chart.js, and custom canvas rendering with responsive layouts and accessibility.
data-visualization-engine.author: workspace

deployment-pipeline-architect.name: Deployment Pipeline Architect
deployment-pipeline-architect.description: Designs CI/CD pipelines with build, test, and deploy stages. Supports GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and custom runners with environment promotion and rollback strategies.
deployment-pipeline-architect.author: workspace

error-message-optimizer.name: Error Message Optimizer
error-message-optimizer.description: Optimizes error messages for clarity, actionability, and user experience. Transforms technical errors into user-friendly messages with recovery suggestions.
error-message-optimizer.author: workspace

error-recovery-orchestrator.name: Error Recovery Orchestrator
error-recovery-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates error recovery strategies including circuit breakers, retry policies, fallback chains, and graceful degradation patterns.
error-recovery-orchestrator.author: workspace

feature-flag-system.name: Feature Flag System
feature-flag-system.description: Implements feature flags for progressive rollouts, A/B testing, and kill switches. Supports user targeting, percentage rollouts, and environment-based flags.
feature-flag-system.author: workspace

file-upload-orchestrator.name: File Upload Orchestrator
file-upload-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates file uploads with progress tracking, chunking, resumable uploads, and validation. Supports S3, GCS, and local storage with virus scanning integration.
file-upload-orchestrator.author: workspace

form-pattern-engine.name: Form Pattern Engine
form-pattern-engine.description: Implements robust form patterns with validation, conditional fields, multi-step wizards, and auto-save. Handles complex validation logic and accessible error display.
form-pattern-engine.author: workspace

interactive-prototype-builder.name: Interactive Prototype Builder
interactive-prototype-builder.description: Builds interactive prototypes with real data, navigation flows, and user interactions. Supports rapid iteration from concept to testable prototype.
interactive-prototype-builder.author: workspace

mobile-gesture-handler.name: Mobile Gesture Handler
mobile-gesture-handler.description: Handles touch gestures including swipe, pinch, long press, and drag. Provides unified gesture recognition across iOS and Android with customizable thresholds.
mobile-gesture-handler.author: workspace

multi-tenant-architecture.name: Multi-Tenant Architecture
multi-tenant-architecture.description: Designs multi-tenant systems with data isolation, tenant-aware routing, and resource quotas. Supports shared database, schema-per-tenant, and database-per-tenant models.
multi-tenant-architecture.author: workspace

notification-system-builder.name: Notification System Builder
notification-system-builder.description: Builds multi-channel notification systems with email, SMS, push, and in-app delivery. Supports templates, scheduling, batching, and delivery tracking.
notification-system-builder.author: workspace

offline-sync-engine.name: Offline Sync Engine
offline-sync-engine.description: Enables offline-first functionality with local storage, sync queues, conflict resolution, and background synchronization. Handles merge strategies for concurrent edits.
offline-sync-engine.author: workspace

performance-budget-enforcer.name: Performance Budget Enforcer
performance-budget-enforcer.description: Enforces performance budgets for bundle size, load time, memory usage, and API response times. Integrates with CI/CD to fail builds that exceed budgets.
performance-budget-enforcer.author: workspace

real-time-collaboration-engine.name: Real-Time Collaboration Engine
real-time-collaboration-engine.description: Enables real-time collaborative editing with operational transformation or CRDT algorithms. Handles presence, cursors, selections, and conflict-free merging.
real-time-collaboration-engine.author: workspace

search-experience-designer.name: Search Experience Designer
search-experience-designer.description: Designs search experiences with autocomplete, faceted filtering, result highlighting, and relevance tuning. Supports Elasticsearch, Algolia, and custom search backends.
search-experience-designer.author: workspace

state-machine-designer.name: State Machine Designer
state-machine-designer.description: Designs finite state machines and statecharts for complex UI and business logic flows. Provides visual state diagrams, transition guards, and side effect handling.
state-machine-designer.author: workspace

workflow-automation-designer.name: Workflow Automation Designer
workflow-automation-designer.description: Designs automated workflows with triggers, conditions, actions, and error handling. Supports event-driven architectures and visual workflow builders.
workflow-automation-designer.author: workspace
